description:
My daughter's roommate is selling her contract. It's a super cute place, sweet roommates, in unit washer and dryer. Available now through August. DM me for the link to the application. 


$510.00 / month

In the basement there is an additional living room/storage area. 



*No Pets Allowed*

Unit Includes:
- fully furnished

- dishwasher
- storage room
- two covered parking spots
